BellaBot Pro.name: BellaBot Pro
BellaBot Pro.subtitle: Premium Delivery & Advertising Robot
BellaBot Pro.hero_description: The next generation of intelligent delivery, combining exceptional multimodal interaction with targeted, high-impact advertising capabilities. Elevate your customer experience while driving additional revenue.
BellaBot Pro.alma_value: At Alma Kinetics, we integrate BellaBot Pro seamlessly into your existing operations. We configure the AI navigation to match your floor plan, set up automated advertising schedules, and connect it to your POS or Kitchen Display Systems for true automation.

features.title: Upgraded VSLAM+
features.desc: Next-level Visual SLAM technology for precise mapping in complex, high-traffic dynamic environments.

features.title: AI Voice Interaction
features.desc: Natural language processing allows guests to interact intuitively, asking questions or receiving greetings.

features.title: Customized Advertisement
features.desc: An integrated 18.5" HD display serves dynamic ads based on location and time of day.

features.title: Superior Mobility
features.desc: Independent suspension system ensures zero spillage even over uneven surfaces.

CC1.name: PUDU CC1
CC1.subtitle: Intelligent Commercial Cleaning Robot
CC1.hero_description: An autonomous 4-in-1 cleaning powerhouse that sweeps, scrubs, vacuums, and dust-mops. Designed for all hard floors, ensuring your facilities remain spotless 24/7 without manual intervention.
CC1.alma_value: Alma Kinetics customizes the CC1 deployment to guarantee ROI. We map your facility for optimal cleaning routes, schedule automated nightly cleaning tasks, and integrate IoT sensors to deploy the CC1 automatically when spills occur.

features.title: 4-in-1 Versatile Cleaning
features.desc: Sweep, scrub, vacuum, and dust-mop in a single pass for unparalleled efficiency.

features.title: Auto Power & Water Refill
features.desc: Automatically returns to its workstation to recharge and swap dirty water for clean water.

features.title: IoT Capabilities
features.desc: Integrates with elevators, automatic doors, and building management systems.

features.title: Dynamic Space Perception
features.desc: Advanced 3D sensors detect obstacles and humans, instantly calculating bypass routes.

BellaBot.name: BellaBot
BellaBot.subtitle: Premium Delivery Robot
BellaBot.hero_description: BellaBot, the premium delivery robot, inherits the outstanding characteristics of the previous generation, while being endowed with superior human-Robot interaction capabilities.
BellaBot.alma_value: With Alma Kinetics, BellaBot becomes a seamless part of your service staff. We program precise waypoints for your restaurant or hotel, train your staff to maximize efficiency, and provide round-the-clock support.

features.title: Bionic Design
features.desc: An innovative bionic design language that provides unprecedented warmth and affection.

features.title: Tactile Feedback
features.desc: The new tactile interaction makes BellaBot more engaging, offering an unprecedented human-robot experience.

features.title: AI Voice Interaction
features.desc: Newly added AI voice module supports hundreds of exclusive contextual dialogue contents.

features.title: Dual SLAM Technology
features.desc: Supports both Laser SLAM and Visual SLAM for accurate positioning in any scenario.

KettyBot Pro.name: KettyBot Pro
KettyBot Pro.subtitle: Delivery & Advertising Robot
KettyBot Pro.hero_description: KettyBot Pro represents the next evolution of reception and delivery. Featuring enhanced displays and upgraded smart navigation, it is the perfect marketing and service tool.
KettyBot Pro.alma_value: We customize KettyBot Pro's advertising campaigns and navigation paths. Our local support ensures your campaigns are always running smoothly while the robot expertly navigates crowded spaces.

features.title: 18.5" HD Display
features.desc: Customizable large screen for dynamic advertisements and reception menus.

features.title: Ultra-narrow Pass
features.desc: Minimum clearance of just 55cm, perfect for tight aisles and crowded spaces.

features.title: AI Reception
features.desc: Smart voice interactions and greeting modes to attract and guide customers.

PuduBot 2.name: PuduBot 2
PuduBot 2.subtitle: Universal Delivery Robot
PuduBot 2.hero_description: The newly upgraded PuduBot 2 features the proprietary PUDU VSLAM+ technology, allowing for markerless deployment and improved environmental adaptability.
PuduBot 2.alma_value: Our implementation of PuduBot 2 eliminates the need for physical markers. We deploy it seamlessly, integrating it with your kitchen workflows to speed up table turnaround.

features.title: Markerless Deployment
features.desc: Pure VSLAM+ technology means no stickers on ceilings, saving 75% on deployment time.

features.title: LFP Battery
features.desc: High-capacity Lithium Iron Phosphate battery for superior safety and long life.

features.title: Improved Stability
features.desc: Upgraded suspension system for smoother delivery of soups and liquids.

FlashBot.name: FlashBot
FlashBot.subtitle: Building Delivery Robot
FlashBot.hero_description: FlashBot is designed for smart building delivery. Capable of taking the elevator safely and reliably to provide secure room delivery for hotels and offices.
FlashBot.alma_value: We integrate FlashBot directly into your building's IoT ecosystem, connecting it to elevators and automatic doors for true multi-floor autonomous delivery.

features.title: IoT Integration
features.desc: Communicates directly with elevator systems for multi-floor navigation.

features.title: Secure Compartments
features.desc: UV sterilized, password-protected cabins ensure safe and hygienic deliveries.

features.title: 3D Obstacle Avoidance
features.desc: Multiple sensors provide comprehensive perception to avoid small obstacles safely.

FlashBot Arm.name: FlashBot Arm
FlashBot Arm.subtitle: Semi-Humanoid Service Robot
FlashBot Arm.hero_description: A pioneering embodied AI robot equipped with dual robotic arms. Designed for complex manipulation tasks previously only possible by humans.
FlashBot Arm.alma_value: We program custom manipulation algorithms for FlashBot Arm, allowing it to perform highly specific physical tasks like pressing elevator buttons or picking up objects in your facility.

features.title: Embodied AI
features.desc: Advanced AI models that understand and interact with the physical world.

features.title: Dual Robotic Arms
features.desc: High degrees of freedom for precise and complex object manipulation.

features.title: Vision-Action Integration
features.desc: Coordinates visual perception with physical action seamlessly.

CC1 Pro.name: CC1 Pro
CC1 Pro.subtitle: AI-powered Autonomous Cleaning Robot
CC1 Pro.hero_description: An upgraded version of the CC1, featuring enhanced cleaning modules and advanced AI scheduling for massive commercial spaces.
CC1 Pro.alma_value: For massive facilities, we optimize CC1 Pro fleets with centralized management, ensuring no zone is missed while reducing your janitorial overhead significantly.

features.title: Deep Cleaning
features.desc: Enhanced brush pressure and water flow for stubborn stains.

features.title: Fully Autonomous
features.desc: Auto-charges, auto-drains, and auto-refills without human intervention.

features.title: Cleaning Reports
features.desc: Generates detailed performance and coverage reports automatically.

MT1.name: MT1
MT1.subtitle: AI Powered Robotic Sweeper
MT1.hero_description: A compact, highly efficient robotic sweeper designed for both indoor and outdoor hard surfaces, managing dust and small debris with ease.
MT1.alma_value: We map your indoor and outdoor transition zones, programming MT1 to handle high-traffic dust accumulation areas continuously, keeping your floors consistently presentable.

features.title: Indoor/Outdoor
features.desc: Versatile enough to handle transitions between different environments.

features.title: Continuous Sweeping
features.desc: Large debris hopper and long battery life for extended sweeping sessions.

features.title: Smart Perception
features.desc: Detects curbs and drop-offs to safely navigate outdoor areas.

MT1 Vac.name: MT1 Vac
MT1 Vac.subtitle: Robotic Sweeper & Vacuum
MT1 Vac.hero_description: Combines robust sweeping mechanics with powerful vacuum suction, perfect for capturing fine dust and larger debris in industrial and commercial settings.
MT1 Vac.alma_value: Ideal for warehouses and retail. We configure the MT1 Vac to run during off-hours, ensuring your space is spotless before the workday begins.

features.title: Powerful Suction
features.desc: High-efficiency vacuum motor captures fine particulates.

features.title: Industrial Build
features.desc: Durable chassis designed for tough commercial environments.

features.title: Automated Scheduling
features.desc: Set it and forget it with app-based scheduling.

MT1 Max.name: MT1 Max
MT1 Max.subtitle: 3D Perception Sweeper
MT1 Max.hero_description: The ultimate sweeping robot, featuring 3D environmental perception to handle the most complex, dynamic spaces safely and efficiently.
MT1 Max.alma_value: For the most demanding environments, we utilize the MT1 Max's 3D perception to create highly accurate safety zones, preventing any interference with human operations.

features.title: 3D Perception
features.desc: Advanced LiDAR and depth cameras create a 3D understanding of the space.

features.title: Enhanced Safety
features.desc: Instantly detects and reacts to dynamic obstacles like forklifts or crowds.

features.title: Max Efficiency
features.desc: Optimized path planning algorithms cover more area in less time.

BG1 Series.name: BG1 Series
BG1 Series.subtitle: Large Scrubber-Dryer Robot
BG1 Series.hero_description: Designed for massive facilities, the BG1 Series is an AI-native large scrubber-dryer that delivers industrial-grade cleaning performance.
BG1 Series.alma_value: We deploy the BG1 in massive warehouses and transport hubs. Our integration includes mapping millions of square feet and setting up automated service stations for zero-downtime operation.

features.title: Massive Capacity
features.desc: Huge clean and waste water tanks for hours of uninterrupted scrubbing.

features.title: Industrial Scrubbing
features.desc: High-pressure brush system removes stubborn grime and tire marks.

features.title: Fleet Management
features.desc: Manage multiple BG1 units from a centralized cloud dashboard.

Pudu T150.name: Pudu T150
Pudu T150.subtitle: Light-payload Industrial Delivery
Pudu T150.hero_description: A versatile industrial delivery robot with a 150kg payload capacity, designed to automate material transport in factories and warehouses.
Pudu T150.alma_value: We seamlessly integrate the T150 into your existing assembly lines, programming it to communicate with your WMS to automate parts delivery and reduce manual handling.

features.title: 150kg Payload
features.desc: Handles significant loads while maintaining agility in tight factory aisles.

features.title: Flexible Attachments
features.desc: Compatible with various top modules like rollers, lifters, or bins.

features.title: WMS Integration
features.desc: Connects directly to Warehouse Management Systems for automated tasking.

Pudu T600.name: Pudu T600
Pudu T600.subtitle: Heavy-payload Industrial Delivery
Pudu T600.hero_description: A heavy-duty industrial powerhouse capable of transporting up to 600kg. The T600 revolutionizes heavy material handling with precision autonomy.
Pudu T600.alma_value: For heavy industry, the T600 is a game-changer. We handle the complex deployment required for heavy payloads, ensuring strict safety protocols and optimized heavy-traffic routing.

features.title: 600kg Payload
features.desc: Massive carrying capacity for heavy manufacturing and pallet transport.

features.title: Industrial Safety
features.desc: 360-degree safety sensors designed specifically for high-momentum loads.

features.title: High Uptime
features.desc: Rapid charging and high-capacity battery for multi-shift operations.

PUDU D7.name: PUDU D7
PUDU D7.subtitle: Semi-Humanoid Robot
PUDU D7.hero_description: The first-generation semi-humanoid robot by Pudu Robotics, bridging the gap between specialized service robots and general-purpose humanoids.
PUDU D7.alma_value: As an advanced robotics integrator, Alma Kinetics offers R&D partnerships to deploy the D7 for cutting-edge pilot programs in complex service environments.

features.title: Semi-Humanoid Form
features.desc: Human-like upper body for complex interactions, mounted on a stable wheeled base.

features.title: General AI
features.desc: Powered by advanced LLMs and embodied AI for generalized task understanding.

features.title: Dexterous Hands
features.desc: Capable of grasping and manipulating a wide variety of everyday objects.

PUDU D9.name: PUDU D9
PUDU D9.subtitle: Full-sized Bipedal Humanoid
PUDU D9.hero_description: The ultimate frontier of robotics. The D9 is a full-sized bipedal humanoid robot designed to operate in environments built entirely for humans.
PUDU D9.alma_value: Alma Kinetics is at the forefront of humanoid integration. We prepare your infrastructure for the future, piloting the D9 in environments where wheels cannot go.

features.title: Bipedal Locomotion
features.desc: Can climb stairs, step over obstacles, and navigate unstructured human environments.

features.title: Full Humanoid
features.desc: Matches human proportions to seamlessly use tools and spaces designed for people.

features.title: The Future of Labor
features.desc: Represents the ultimate goal of general-purpose automation.
